vulnerability.reason: Generated shifts vulnerability from detector overfitting to user lack of verification skills, describing a related but different sensitivity condition.
vulnerability.reference: Deepfake detectors overfitted to known patterns fail on novel forgeries, leaving platforms defenseless.
vulnerability.generated: Users lack independent media verification skills, relying entirely on a detection system that misses novel forgeries.

impact.reason: Both affected party (public) and damage types (misinformation, erosion of trust) are present.
impact.reference: Undetected deepfakes spread virally, amplifying misinformation and eroding public trust in online content.
impact.generated: Undetected synthetic media misleads users, propagating misinformation and eroding public trust in online content.

dose_response.reason: Core arc from overfitting to undetected media to misinformation is present, but generated inserts an extra causal step (lack of user verification skills) not in the reference.
dose_response.reference: Overfitting to limited synthetic forgery patterns causes detectors to miss novel deepfakes, exposing social media users to undetected synthetic media that spreads misinformation, eroding trust.
dose_response.generated: Overfitting from LoRA fine-tuning on limited data degrades cross-domain deepfake detection, through exposing users to undetected synthetic media, triggers lack of independent verification skills, leading to undetected media misleading users, spreading misinformation and eroding public trust.
